ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "sr_no" INTEGER /* Serial number of the case */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of the case (e.g., WRIC, Writ, Appeal) */,
  "fil_no" INTEGER /* Filing number of the case */,
  "fil_year" INTEGER /* Year of filing */,
  "adv_reg" TEXT /* Advocate registration number */,
  "date_of_filing" TEXT /* Date the case was filed */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court where the case is being heard */,
  "court_location" TEXT /* Location of the court */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., Pending, In Progress, Closed) */,
  "case_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the case (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the party is involved in */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of the party (e.g., Petitioner, Respondent, Advocate) */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the party (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  "party_address" TEXT /* Address of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the document is associated with */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Petition, Affidavit, Judgment) */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., Draft, Final, Approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the activity is related to */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., Filing, Hearing, Meeting) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_activities_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Attorney, Paralegal, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Litigation, Corporate) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the history entry is related to */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of the change (e.g., Update, Correction, Amendment) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hearings" (
  "hearing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hearing */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the hearing is related to */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the hearing */,
  "hearing_time" TEXT /* Time of the hearing */,
  "hearing_location" TEXT /* Location of the hearing */,
  "hearing_type" TEXT /* Type of the hearing (e.g., Initial, Pre-Trial, Trial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hearing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hearings_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the bill is related to */,
  "bill_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was generated */,
  "bill_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the bill */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the case */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the case was assigned */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., Active, Inactive, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_assignments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_deadlines" (
  "deadline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deadline */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the deadline is related to */,
  "deadline_date" TEXT /* Date of the deadline */,
  "deadline_type" TEXT /* Type of the deadline (e.g., Filing, Hearing, Submission) */,
  "deadline_description" TEXT /* Description of the deadline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deadline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_deadlines_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the communication is related to */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of the communication (e.g., Email, Phone Call, Letter) */,
  "communication_description" TEXT /* Description of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
